_meta.description: Definitive mapping of GloranthaCoreRunes font glyphs to Gloranthan rune names
_meta.source: Font analysis of 213 cult one-pager PDFs (Notes from Pavis 2019 v5.2)
_meta.method: pdfplumber character-level font detection + cross-reference with MIRACLES_DATA rune_code_legend

c.note: Also used as part of Air compound

Space character rendered in rune font — formatting artifact, ignore
ignored_in_rune_font.,: Comma rendered in rune font — formatting artifact, ignore
Period rendered in rune font — formatting artifact or separator, ignore
ignored_in_rune_font.?: Unknown glyph — appears before cult names, likely a formatting artifact or ligature indicator
ignored_in_rune_font./: Separator rendered in rune font — ignore
ignored_in_rune_font.1: Numeric in rune font — likely Moon phase indicator
ignored_in_rune_font.2: Numeric in rune font — likely Moon phase indicator
ignored_in_rune_font.3: Numeric in rune font — likely Moon phase indicator
ignored_in_rune_font.5: Numeric in rune font — likely Moon phase indicator
ignored_in_rune_font.7: Numeric in rune font — likely special indicator

compound_rules.description: Multiple consecutive rune glyphs indicate the miracle uses multiple/any runes
